_meta: EXAMPLE response from this config (NOT served live). The live AP stack here serves SEP-1 + SEP-38 /info, but POST /sep38/quote returns 'forbidden' without a SEP-10 JWT and 'service not available' until the Rate Integration callback (business server) is wired — that is the T1 deliverable. This object is the shape that integration will return. Endpoint: POST https://anchor.bleu.builders/sep38/quote (SEP-10 JWT required). Request body in _request below. Numbers (rate 5.42 BRL/USDC, PIX fee 1.50 BRL) are illustrative.

details.name: PIX settlement fee
details.description: Anchor fee for settling BRL via PIX.

details.name: IOF
details.description: Decreto 6.306/2007 — anticipatory; not mandated for crypto FX today
